settings.title: Become an Affiliate Partner
settings.text: Join our Affiliate Program and turn your influence into income! Promote our premium furniture, lighting, sculptures, and decor essentials, and earn 10% commissions on every sale. With a vast collection of trendy and high-quality pieces, you’ll have endless opportunities to inspire your audience and maximize your earnings. Please contact us before starting your journey to ensure smooth onboarding and guidance.
We enjoy working with influential and diverse affiliates who share our vision of excellence. We are always looking for partnership proposals.

settings.title: Earn Up to 10% Commission on Every Sale
settings.text:
Turn your influence into income! As our affiliate, you can earn up
to 10% commission on every sale made through your unique
referral link. There are no limits—whether you're a micro-influencer
or have a massive following, your earning potential grows as you
promote our products.

settings.title: Exclusive Discounts to Boost Engagement
settings.text:
Your followers will love you even more! We provide you with
exclusive discount codes to share with your audience, making it
easier to drive conversions. This not only helps increase your sales
but also strengthens trust and engagement with your community.

settings.title: Seamless Tracking & Fast Payouts
settings.text:
Stay in control of your performance with our real-time tracking
dashboard. Monitor clicks, conversions, and commissions
effortlessly. Plus, we ensure fast and reliable payouts, so you get
rewarded on time without any hassle.

settings.service_description: Turn your influence into income! As our affiliate, you can earn upto 10% commission on every sale made through your uniquereferral link. There are no limits—whether you're a micro-influenceror have a massive following, your earning potential grows as youpromote our products.

Your followers will love you even more! We provide you with exclusive discount codes to share with your audience, making it easier to drive conversions. This not only helps increase your salesbut also strengthens trust and engagement with your community.

Stay in control of your performance with our real-time tracking dashboard. Monitor clicks, conversions, and commissions effortlessly. Plus, we ensure fast and reliable payouts, so you getrewarded on time without any hassle.

settings.question: What is your Affiliate Program?
settings.answer: Our affiliate program financially rewards you for directing customers to our shop. When a product is purchased by a customer you refer, we pay you a commission for each sale.

settings.question: Does it cost me anything to become an affiliate?
settings.answer: It's absolutely free to join the Trufairs Affiliate Program. There's no charge to apply and there's no minimum sales requirement.

settings.question: How does Trufairs track orders coming from my website?
settings.answer: An ID is assigned when you sign up through our online form. Links from associate websites to Trufairs use a special format that includes this code. Every time a customer follows one of those links, the unique URL tells us which page to display as well as which associate sent the customer to us. We keep track of associate IDs as the customer browses our website, even if they close their browser and come back within 15 days using the same browser and device. This means if the customer returns within that period, even without clicking the link again, any purchase will still be credited to you as an affiliate sale. The entire process is seamlessly tracked and managed through the Uppromote Affiliate Shopify app, ensuring accurate commission reporting.

settings.question: How can I make more money through your program?
settings.answer: Target specific promotions through banners, blog posts, tweets, videos or emails to create awareness about your product review or recommendation list. This personalized method works best in boosting conversion rates. But, we don't accept websites with Trufairs coupons.

settings.question: Do you have instructions for how to use Affiliate Program?
settings.answer: Check this page for full instructions on how to register for and participate in the Affiliate Program.

settings.question: I earned a commission selling items. When I will be paid?
settings.answer: You’ll get your commission every month in the first week, so your earnings arrive on time without delay.

settings.question: I don’t have a website. Can I participate in your program?
settings.answer: Yes, you can. Please see the Affiliate Guidelines for more information about this. You can't clone or copy webpage presentations or use iframes.

settings.question: Can I promote Trufairs items on more than one website?
settings.answer: Yes, absolutely. You can promote Trufairs products across one or all of your websites. The more links and content you share, the more qualified visitors you're likely to send us — and this should translate into higher conversion rates.

settings.question: Can I participate if I live outside the United States?
settings.answer: Yes, you may participate in the Affiliate Program if you live outside the United States. We have associates from all over the world and are continuously expanding our network. However, please note that all sales must be made to customers within the United States, as we do not currently sell or ship outside of the U.S. Any orders placed from outside the United States will not be fulfilled.

settings.question: Can I buy one of your items using my own affiliate link?
settings.answer: Trufairs does not allow you to purchase items through your own affiliate links.
